---
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: lualatex
execute:
  enabled: false
---

$X\sim U(-1,1)$.

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
import numpy as np

rng = np.random.default_rng(7)
x = rng.uniform(-1, 1, size=20_000)
```

![](../shared/figures/generated/numpy_uniform_sample.png){width=58% .nostretch}
